answer_translation: {"en":"ORFEY is a renowned beatboxer, champion of France in 2020, and founder of GROWL UP FRANCE to promote beatboxing in music and performance. He is also part of the duo POTSIKEI and has released music on Bandcamp and Spotify.","ja":"ORFEY氏は著名なビートボクサーであり、2020年フランスチャンピオンに輝きました。また、音楽とパフォーマンスにおけるビートボクシングの普及を目的とした「GROWL UP FRANCE」の創設者でもあります。さらにデュオ「POTSIKEI」のメンバーとして活動し、BandcampやSpotifyで楽曲をリリースしています。","ko":"ORFEY는 저명한 비트박서로, 2020년 프랑스 챔피언이며 음악과 공연에서 비트박싱을 장려하기 위해 GROWL UP FRANCE를 설립했습니다. 또한 듀오 POTSIKEI의 일원이며 Bandcamp와 Spotify를 통해 음악을 발매했습니다.","zh-hans":"ORFEY是享誉业界的口技艺术家，2020年法国冠军得主，并创立GROWL UP FRANCE组织以推动口技在音乐与表演领域的普及。他同时是二人组合POTSIKEI成员，其音乐作品已发布于Bandcamp及Spotify平台。","zh-hant":"ORFEY是享譽國際的節奏口技藝術家，2020年法國冠軍得主，並創立GROWL UP FRANCE組織以推廣節奏口技在音樂與表演領域的發展。他同時身為雙人組合POTSIKEI成員，其音樂作品已於Bandcamp及Spotify平台發行。"}

They have collaborated in various videos, including \"The Faster Going Way\" and \"Fast & Furious beatbox.\" Their skills are highly regarded in the beatboxing community.","ja":"ALEM & SKILLERは、高速パフォーマンスと競技バトルで知られる著名なビートボクサーです。「The Faster Going Way」や「Fast & Furious beatbox」など、々な動画で共演しています。彼らの技術はビートボクシング界で高く評価されています。","ko":"ALEM & SKILLER는 초고속 퍼포먼스와 경쟁적인 배틀로 유명한 비트박서들입니다. 그들은 \"더 빠른 길(The Faster Going Way)\"과 \"패스트 앤 퓨리어스 비트박스(Fast & Furious beatbox)\"를 포함한 다양한 영상에서 협업해 왔습니다. 그들의 실력은 비트박싱 커뮤니티에서 매우 높이 평가받고 있습니다.","zh-hant":"ALEM & SKILLER是享譽盛名的節奏口技表演者，以高速演出與競技對決聞名。兩人曾合作多支影片，包括《The Faster Going Way》與《Fast & Furious節奏口技》，其技藝在節奏口技界備受推崇。"}

TIMMEH의 유튜브 채널에는 다양한 비트박스 공연 영상이 게재되어 있습니다.","zh-hant":"TIMMEH是荷蘭節奏口技表演者，以參與國際節奏口技大賽聞名。他曾於Astro節奏口技大賽晉級前十六強，並在2022年One One Battle國際賽躋身八強。TIMMEH的YouTube頻道收錄多部節奏口技表演影片。"}

Even before graduating from high school, he took part in various theater, music and video projects and began to write his own lyrics. At the same time he is taking his first steps in rap and beatboxing. During his studies of communication science and technical acoustics at the TU-Berlin, he rehearses with various jazz bands and rap formations. He is part of "Razzz - Das Beatboxmusical", the world's first musical in which all songs and sounds are made with the mouth. He contributes many lyrics and is on stage as a beatboxer, singer & actor. In addition to working on and off the stages of this world, Chlorophil passes on his knowledge in rap, songwriting or beatboxing workshops. ### Beatboxing Competitions[]. This is a Face Off Battles of the Online Group Stage Battle for the European Beatbox Championship 2023. In the final phase of the Online Group Stage, every 1st ranked from a group has to face a 2nd ranked from a different group. This Battle will decide who will qualify for the European Beatbox Championship Live Event. 


All participants will battle every other participant in their Group once in an AB-BA Battle.
At the start of each Battle, a coin flip will decide which Beatboxer will be A and which one will be B.
Beatboxer A announces which one of his 9 Videos shall be played. After that, Beatboxer B will announce which one of his 9 Videos shall be played.

After every round, the Judges will make a decision and announce which Beatboxer got their Points. In the second round, Beatboxer B is starting, and Beatboxer A can answer this time.

The points received from both rounds determine the winner of this battle.

More Information at www.beatboxeurope.com

The Grand Beatbox Battle 2025 with the Opening Ceremony performance by SO-SO 🇯🇵.
Opening day at GBB is always a unique moment. It sets the tone for the entire event, the energy, the anticipation, and the shared excitement of a global community coming together for several days of beatbox culture. This performance marks the start of GBB25 and, with it, the beginning of an unforgettable edition.
SO-SO has been part of the Grand Beatbox Battle journey in many roles over the years:
as a competitor, a champion in the Crew and Tag Team Loopstation categories, a judge, a performer, and now as a solo artist opening the main stage.
We wish him nothing but the best for his future path, and we hope our paths cross again.
Much love and respect.

# The Beatbox House. **The Beatbox House** is an American beatbox group, consisting of beatboxers Gene Shinozaki, Kenny Urban, NaPoM, Amit, and Chris Celiz. The group's origins come from an actual house in Brooklyn, New York first owned by beatboxers Chris Celiz, Mark Martin, Izzy Jay, and Johnny Sansone in 2014. The group envisioned the house as a place where beatboxers could live and hang out in.
